caption: Three people are seated on gold-colored chairs on a stage against a dark purple background accented by vertical neon pink lights. A man on the left wears a white button-down shirt and dark trousers, a woman in the center wears a black short-sleeved top and black trousers, and a man on the right wears a grey suit over a light blue shirt. Between the man and woman on the left sits a large, white, intricately detailed sculptural object. The man on the left is speaking and gesturing with his hands throughout the sequence. The woman sits attentively with her hands clasped in her lap, while the man on the right sits with his legs crossed, looking toward the first speaker. In the foreground, a black panel displays a partially visible red logo with the white text "SL". The scene remains static except for the shifting gestures and postures of the speakers.
